text:
(a) The portion of State Highway 191 in Midland County is designated as the Sergeant Michael Naylor Memorial Highway.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

(1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Sergeant Michael Naylor Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

(2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.102 (Captain Jesse Billingsley Memorial Loop in Bastrop County) by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 324 (S.B. 1488 ), Sec. 24.001(40), eff. September 1, 2017.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.114 — Sergeant Michael Naylor Memorial Highway

(a) The portion of State Highway 191 in Midland County is designated as the Sergeant Michael Naylor Memorial Highway.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

    (1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Sergeant Michael Naylor Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

    (2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.102 (Captain Jesse Billingsley Memorial Loop in Bastrop County) by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 324 (S.B. 1488 ), Sec. 24.001(40), eff. September 1, 2017.

*Added by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1233 (S.B.2041), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2015.*

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.102 (Captain Jesse Billingsley Memorial Loop in Bastrop County) by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 324 (S.B. 1488 ), Sec. 24.001(40), eff. September 1, 2017.
